title: The Fundamental Basis of Palpitations: A Neurocardiology Approach.

assets.abstract: BACKGROUND AND OBJECTIVE: Palpitations are a common symptom that may indicate cardiac arrhythmias, be a somatic complaint in anxiety disorders, and can be present in patients without either condition. The objective of this review was to explore the pathways and fundamental mechanisms through which individuals appreciate palpitations.
